meaning: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way.
example: Finding that book was pure serendipity — I wasn't even looking for it.

meaning: Lasting for a very short time; fleeting.
meaningNP: अत्यन्त छोटो समय मात्र टिक्ने; क्षणभङ्गुर।
example: The ephemeral beauty of cherry blossoms reminds us to appreciate the present.

meaning: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness.
example: Her resilience after the setback inspired everyone around her.

meaning: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
meaningNP: बोल्न वा लेख्नमा प्रभावकारी र प्रवाहपूर्ण।
example: She delivered an eloquent speech that moved the entire audience.

meaning: Sweet or musical; pleasant to hear.
example: The mellifluous sound of the violin filled the concert hall.
Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

meaning: Persistence in doing something despite difficulty or delay in achieving success.
meaningNP: कठिनाइको बावजुद निरन्तर लागिरहने गुण; दृढता।
example: His perseverance through years of rejection finally paid off.

meaning: A sentimental longing for the past, typically for a period or place with happy memories.
meaningNP: विगतका सुखद क्षणहरूप्रति मनमा उत्पन्न हुने मीठो सम्झना।
example: The old photographs filled her with a warm sense of nostalgia.

meaning: Representing the most perfect or typical example of a quality or class.
meaningNP: उत्कृष्ट वा विशिष्ट गुणको सबैभन्दा सटिक उदाहरण।
example: Paris is the quintessential romantic city.

meaning: The highest point reached in the sky; the peak or climax.
meaningNP: आकाशमा कुनै खगोलीय पिण्डको सबैभन्दा माथिल्लो बिन्दु; चरम बिन्दु।
example: Her career reached its zenith with the release of her bestselling novel.

meaning: Extremely delicate and light in a way that seems not of this world.
meaningNP: अत्यन्त कोमल र हल्का, मानौं यो संसारको होइन।
example: The ethereal glow of the northern lights danced across the sky.

meaning: Open to more than one interpretation; not having a clear meaning.
meaningNP: एकभन्दा बढी अर्थ लाग्न सक्ने; अस्पष्ट।
example: The ending of the movie was deliberately ambiguous.

meaning: A small waterfall or series of waterfalls; a process that develops in stages.
meaningNP: सानो झरना वा झरनाहरूको श्रृंखला; चरणबद्ध रूपमा विकास हुने प्रक्रिया।
example: The cascade of events led to an unexpected outcome.
The benevolent donor funded scholarships for underprivileged students.
